channel.title: Ichiro Fujinaga on Néstor Nápoles López
channel.description: Recent content in Ichiro Fujinaga on Néstor Nápoles López

item.title: Musical Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: A music-based game mechanic based where players compete to complete cadences

item.title: Dandelot - Reading Music as a Game
item.description: Dandelot is a computer game that trains your skills for reading music in the treble, bass, and alto clefs.

item.title: Encoding Matters
item.description: Examples of encoding discrepancies that have been introduced either during the encoding of the symbolic music files or during the translation of the original file into other symbolic formats.

item.title: Symbolic and Audio Key Detection Based on a Hidden Markov Model
item.description: Symbolic and audio key estimation algorithm based on Hidden Markov Models. Implemented in C++.
